title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9: Leaks and AI Features Reported in Germany
description: Recent reports from Giga, Samsung Global Newsroom, and Netzwelt discuss new Galaxy Watch models, leaks, and AI features trending in Germany.

sources.title: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2: Wie hat Samsung das nur geschafft?
Coming soon: Ein neuer AI-gestützter Begleiter für Wellness und Fitness direkt am Handgelenk
Keine Überraschung mehr: 2 Neue Galaxy Watch komplett geleakt - Farben, Chip und Akku bekannt

sections.heading: Leaked Specifications
paragraphs: According to Netzwelt, two new Galaxy Watch models have been completely leaked. The report states that details regarding the colors, chip, and battery of these devices are now known.

sections.heading: AI-Powered Wellness Companion
paragraphs: Samsung Global Newsroom reports the upcoming arrival of a new AI-supported companion. This device is described as being designed for wellness and fitness and is intended to be worn directly on the wrist.

sections.heading: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 Coverage
paragraphs: Giga has published an article titled 'Galaxy Watch Ultra 2: Wie hat Samsung das nur geschafft?' discussing the device. The source questions how Samsung managed the development of this specific model.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: The term 'samsung galaxy watch 9' has achieved a search volume with a lower bound of 2000 in Germany. This data is based on a trend snapshot taken in July 2026.

faq.q: What details have been leaked about the new watches?
faq.a: According to Netzwelt, two new Galaxy Watch models have been leaked, revealing information about their colors, chip, and battery.

faq.q: What is the focus of the new AI companion mentioned by Samsung?
faq.a: Samsung Global Newsroom indicates that the new AI-supported companion is focused on wellness and fitness for the wrist.
